objective: Build a point-in-time SW industry breadth, dispersion, liquidity breadth, and rotation-persistence feature layer from accepted industry index history; no portfolio harness or model promotion.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not use current constituent, current component, or latest-weight snapshots.
Do not claim official total-return evidence from provider price-index history.
Do not promote industry features into the default model.
Do not tune V3.64/V3.65 same-branch MARKET proxy thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: V3.66 queue must contain at least three V3.68 SW industry feature-layer tasks.
V3.66 source inventory must mark SW industry daily history ready for feature-layer use.
Feature panel must have at least 6000 dates and latest industry count must be at least 25.
All feature rows must be after-close for next-trade-date use.
Source and feature quality checks must pass.
No output CSV column contains forbidden performance or promotion terms.
failure_conditions: Any output uses current component snapshots or latest index weights.
Any output allows portfolio harness or model promotion.
Any NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return output is produced.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: factor_researcher should start V3.69 macro growth-liquidity feature-layer construction from macro_pit_panel.
